plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-435 RP14.P04.M02.S12-RP14.P04.M04.S09 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-435 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP14.P04 implementation slice: the M02 Type And Shape Definition tail (the nine remaining rows), the full M03 Primary Implementation Slice cycle (twenty-two rows), and the M04 Secondary Workflow Slice head (the first nine rows) as three descriptor-only sections over 40 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H14), Claude review packet (C14), and CP00-436 handoff, without opening settlement, origination, allocation, or working credit runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-435 is a descriptor-only settlement-core pack (RP14.P04.M02.S12-RP14.P04.M04.S09, 40 units, Risk B). Verified end-to-end consistency across closeout-pack-plan.json, review baseline, manifest, registry binding (SETTLEMENT_CORE_CP435_PACK_BINDING), CP435 requirements, service descriptor builders, validators, the contract projection (contracts/settlement-core-contract.json), README, and tests: unit count (40), range, micro-phase counts (M02:9, M03:22, M04:9), deliverable distribution (ui:17/impl:10/fixture:2/test:2/hermes:2/claude:4/security:3), and micro-title distribution all match exactly. The pack-level production_ready claim is correctly FALSE in both manifest.json and command-evidence.json (runtime_ready false, implementation_layer descriptor); no production/enterprise-trust overclaim is made. No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold: every descriptor row is descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, raw_payload_included=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true; the settlement src modules contain no file/network/process-execution code; no secrets or PII found. Claude authority boundary is preserved (claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false; claude packet read_only with Read/Grep/Glob only), and Hermes is used solely for the descriptor evidence/receipt packet (receipt_shape descriptor_only..no_write; emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. CP178+ review-hardening invariants are encoded (complete forbidden_review_evidence / invalid_review_blockers lists) and the readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1434-byte JSON stdout) with zero invalid attempts. Changed-file scope is correct: the seven dirty implementation files are all in-scope; index.js is unchanged but re-exports the new CP435 functions; unrelated dirty/untracked files (docx, workbook/*, ldip-integration) are correctly excluded and none in active scope are omitted. No P0/P1/P2 issues. One non-blocking P3: the post-review evidence artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are not yet present, which is expected because they are produced from this review per the documented hardening sequence; closeout must not commit until they are generated and validated. Recommend PASS; final enterprise-trust/goal closeout remains a human decision outside this read-only review.

findings.title: Post-review evidence artifacts pending generation (expected by design)
findings.details: manifest.json evidence_refs and required_pack_artifacts list docs/closeout-packs/cp00-435/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json currently exist in that directory. This is consistent with the documented state (status 'implemented_pending_review', pack_level_claude_review.status 'pending', valid_review_receipts: []) and the hardening_sequence, in which these three artifacts are produced from the accepted Claude review (this run), then adjudication and construction-inspection. command-evidence.json notes also flag these as post-review gated commands run before commit. It is not a defect, but it is a real closeout-gating dependency.
findings.recommendation: Before final closeout commit, generate claude-review-result.json from this accepted review, run the normalize/receipt:validate steps, then produce adjudication.md and construction-inspection.json, and run npm run closeout-pack:validate plus git diff --check --cached. Do not commit the closeout while these required_pack_artifacts are absent, or evidence_refs will dangle.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected by design and non-blocking. Operator must generate and validate the three post-review artifacts before committing CP00-435 closeout.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-435 settlement core p04 implementation slice descriptor pack
